mapper.select: SELECT RNUM , RNUM_ORDER , BOARD_SEQ , BOARD_SUBJECT , BOARD_CONTENTS , CRET_DT , BOARD_ATT_YN , ATT_SEQ , FILE_PATH_NM , FILE_TYPE , FILE_CAPA , CRET_DT FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER () OVER (ORDER BY AA.BOARD_SEQ DESC, AA.CRET_DT DESC) AS RNUM_ORDER ,ROW_NUMBER () OVER (ORDER BY AA.BOARD_SEQ ASC, AA.CRET_DT ASC) AS RNUM , AA.BOARD_SEQ AS BOARD_SEQ , AA.BOARD_SUBJECT AS BOARD_SUBJECT , AA.BOARD_CONTENTS AS BOARD_CONTENTS , TO_CHAR (AA.CRET_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS CRET_DT , AA.BOARD_ATT_YN AS BOARD_ATT_YN , BB.ATT_SEQ AS ATT_SEQ , BB.FILE_PATH_NM AS FILE_PATH_NM , BB.FILE_TYPE AS FILE_TYPE , BB.FILE_CAPA AS FILE_CAPA FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS AA, ( SELECT AA.ATT_SEQ AS ATT_SEQ , AA.FILE_PATH_NM AS FILE_PATH_NM , AA.FILE_TYPE AS FILE_TYPE , AA.FILE_CAPA AS FILE_CAPA , AA.BOARD_SEQ FROM NMCP_BOARD_ATT_DTL AA, ( SELECT MAX (ATT_SEQ) AS ATT_SEQ, BOARD_SEQ FROM NMCP_BOARD_ATT_DTL GROUP BY BOARD_SEQ) BB WHERE AA.ATT_SEQ = BB.ATT_SEQ AND AA.BOARD_SEQ = BB.BOARD_SEQ) BB WHERE AA.BOARD_CTG_SEQ = 53 AND AA.VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND AA.NOTI_YN = 'Y' AND AA.BOARD_SEQ = BB.BOARD_SEQ(+) ORDER BY BOARD_WRITE_DT DESC, BOARD_SEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3 ORDER BY RNUM DESC
